instructions.how_to_use: Use these prompts with AI image generators like Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, or Adobe Firefly
steps: 2. Copy the prompt from this JSON
6. Upload to your portfolio assets folder
instructions.file_naming: Use the 'name' field for file naming (replace spaces with hyphens, add .png extension)
